subject: NEW: Worldwide FB Tango Groups - 135 cities, 400+ groups
body:
Booker,

I just scraped FB tango groups for 135 cities worldwide using WebSearch.

## FILE LOCATION

`ai-discovered/harvester/data/fb_groups_worldwide.json`

## STATS

- Cities searched: 135
- Total groups found: 400+
- Regions: USA, Europe, South America, Asia, Australia, Middle East, Africa

## YOUR TASK

1. DEDUP against your existing groups in SQLite
2. Add new groups to your processing queue
3. These are VERIFIED group URLs from web search

## FORMAT

JSON with:
- city, country
- groups[] with name and URL
- global_groups[] for worldwide groups

## NOTES

- Some cities had no results (Hanoi, Panama City, Quito, Caracas, Medellin, Cincinnati, Raleigh)
- All URLs are facebook.com/groups/ format
- Ready for your CDP scraping pipeline

Let me know when you've processed it.

— Harvey
